# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prebuild
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

variables:
  CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR: "ci-scripts"
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "build.sh"
  TEST_SCRIPT: "test.sh"
  PACKAGE_SCRIPT: "package.sh"
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "deploy.sh"
  PREBUILD_SCRIPT: "prebuild.sh"
  CLEANUP_SCRIPT: "cleanup.sh"
  ENABLE_PREBUILD: "false"
  ENABLE_BUILD: "true"
  ENABLE_TEST: "true"
  ENABLE_PACKAGE: "false"
  ENABLE_DEPLOY: "false"
  SCRIPT_TIMEOUT: "3600"
  CUSTOM_BUILD_ARGS: ""
  CUSTOM_TEST_ARGS: ""
  CUSTOM_PACKAGE_ARGS: ""
  CUSTOM_DEPLOY_ARGS: ""

.script_runner:
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - echo "Checking for custom scripts in ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/"
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true
    - export CI_PROJECT_DIR="${CI_PROJECT_DIR}"
    - export CI_COMMIT_SHA="${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
    - export CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME="${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
  timeout: ${SCRIPT_TIMEOUT}s
  retry:
    max: 2
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure

prebuild:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: prebuild
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PREBUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom prebuild script: ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PREBUILD_SCRIPT}"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PREBUILD_SCRIPT}
      else
        echo "No custom prebuild script found. Skipping prebuild stage."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - output/
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 1 hour
    when: always
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_PREBUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH && $ENABLE_PREBUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

build:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script: ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT} ${CUSTOM_BUILD_ARGS}
      else
        echo "ERROR: Build script not found at ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
        exit 1
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - output/
      - artifacts/
      - target/
      - bin/
      - obj/
      - "*.log"
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
    expire_in: 1 day
    when: always
  dependencies:
    - prebuild
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_BUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

build:parallel:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: build
  parallel:
    matrix:
      - BUILD_VARIANT: [debug, release]
      - PLATFORM: [linux, windows, macos]
  script:
    - |
      export BUILD_VARIANT="${BUILD_VARIANT}"
      export PLATFORM="${PLATFORM}"
      VARIANT_SCRIPT="${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/build-${BUILD_VARIANT}-${PLATFORM}.sh"
      if [ -f "${VARIANT_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing variant build script: ${VARIANT_SCRIPT}"
        ${VARIANT_SCRIPT} ${CUSTOM_BUILD_ARGS}
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing default build script with variant: ${BUILD_VARIANT} for ${PLATFORM}"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT} ${BUILD_VARIANT} ${PLATFORM} ${CUSTOM_BUILD_ARGS}
      else
        echo "No build script found for ${BUILD_VARIANT}-${PLATFORM}"
        exit 1
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/${BUILD_VARIANT}/${PLATFORM}/
      - dist/${BUILD_VARIANT}/${PLATFORM}/
      - artifacts/${BUILD_VARIANT}/${PLATFORM}/
    expire_in: 1 day
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_BUILD == "true" && $ENABLE_PARALLEL_BUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

test:unit:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${TEST_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script: ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${TEST_SCRIPT}"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${TEST_SCRIPT} ${CUSTOM_TEST_ARGS}
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-unit.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing unit test script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-unit.sh ${CUSTOM_TEST_ARGS}
      else
        echo "No test script found. Skipping tests."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
      - reports/
      - "*.xml"
      - "*.html"
    reports:
      junit: test-results/*.xml
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage/cobertura.xml
    expire_in: 7 days
    when: always
  coverage: '/TOTAL.*\s+(\d+%)$/'
  dependencies:
    - build
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

test:integration:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-integration.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing integration test script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-integration.sh ${CUSTOM_TEST_ARGS}
      else
        echo "No integration test script found. Skipping."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/integration/
      - reports/integration/
    expire_in: 7 days
    when: always
  dependencies:
    - build
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST == "true" && $ENABLE_INTEGRATION_TESTS == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

test:e2e:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-e2e.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing end-to-end test script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/test-e2e.sh ${CUSTOM_TEST_ARGS}
      else
        echo "No e2e test script found. Skipping."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/e2e/
      - screenshots/
      - videos/
    expire_in: 7 days
    when: always
  dependencies:
    - build
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST == "true" && $ENABLE_E2E_TESTS == "true"'
      when: always
    - when: never

package:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: package
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PACKAGE_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom package script: ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PACKAGE_SCRIPT}"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${PACKAGE_SCRIPT} ${CUSTOM_PACKAGE_ARGS}
      else
        echo "No package script found. Skipping packaging."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - packages/
      - dist/
      - release/
      - "*.tar.gz"
      - "*.zip"
      - "*.deb"
      - "*.rpm"
    expire_in: 30 days
  dependencies:
    - build
    - test:unit
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_PACKAGE == "true"'
      when: always
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'
      when: always
    - when: never

deploy:staging:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      export DEPLOY_ENV="staging"
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-staging.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing staging deployment script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-staging.sh ${CUSTOM_DEPLOY_ARGS}
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing default deployment script for staging"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${DEPLOY_SCRIPT} staging ${CUSTOM_DEPLOY_ARGS}
      else
        echo "No deployment script found."
        exit 1
      fi
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    on_stop: cleanup:staging
  dependencies:
    - package
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
      when: manual
    - when: never

deploy:production:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      export DEPLOY_ENV="production"
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-production.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing production deployment script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/deploy-production.sh ${CUSTOM_DEPLOY_ARGS}
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing default deployment script for production"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${DEPLOY_SCRIPT} production ${CUSTOM_DEPLOY_ARGS}
      else
        echo "No deployment script found."
        exit 1
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
    on_stop: cleanup:production
  dependencies:
    - package
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_TAG'
      when: manual
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
    - when: never

cleanup:staging:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${CLEANUP_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing cleanup script for staging"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${CLEANUP_SCRIPT} staging
      else
        echo "No cleanup script found."
      fi
  environment:
    name: staging
    action: stop
  when: manual
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true"'
      when: manual
    - when: never

cleanup:production:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${CLEANUP_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing cleanup script for production"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${CLEANUP_SCRIPT} production
      else
        echo "No cleanup script found."
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
    action: stop
  when: manual
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true"'
      when: manual
    - when: never

custom:job:
  extends: .script_runner
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CUSTOM_JOB_SCRIPT" ] && [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${CUSTOM_JOB_SCRIPT}" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom job script: ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${CUSTOM_JOB_SCRIPT}"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_DIR}/${CUSTOM_JOB_SCRIPT} ${CUSTOM_JOB_ARGS}
      else
        echo "CUSTOM_JOB_SCRIPT not defined or script not found"
        exit 1
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - custom-output/
    expire_in: 1 day
  rules:
    - if: '$CUSTOM_JOB_SCRIPT'
      when: manual
    - when: never
